fullCourseName: MQTT and ESP32 IoT Lab Course @ Metropolia
shortDescription: Build an end-to-end IoT pipeline with ESP32, MQTT, sensors, actuators, backend storage, and dashboards.
fullDescription: This course introduces students to modern IoT development through practical ESP32 laboratory assignments. Students implement periodic telemetry, MQTT command handling, sensor integrations, actuator control, and backend-connected historical and realtime views. The course is structured so that each lab can be verified through MQTT traffic and, when needed, through visible physical effects captured by a camera.
requirements: Beginner-friendly. Basic familiarity with variables, functions, and loops is helpful.
